phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rialto Market is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il mercato di Rialto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel mer-KAH-toh dee RYAH-ltoh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Rialto Market has supplied Venice with fish and produce since the 11th century — fish is sold in the morning, vegetables all day.

responses.english: Next to the bridge, on the San Polo side.
responses.phonetic: ak-KAN-toh al PON-teh, sool LAH-toh dee san POH-loh.
responses.local: Accanto al ponte, sul lato di San Polo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Frari church is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Basilica dei Frari?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bah-ZEE-lee-kah day FRAH-ree?

responses.english: Straight on from Rialto, seven minutes.
responses.phonetic: SEM-preh DREET-toh dah RYAH-ltoh, SET-teh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Sempre dritto da Rialto, sette minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat near the Rialto without tourist prices
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un posto autentico dove mangiare vicino a Rialto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon POS-toh ow-TEN-tee-koh DOH-veh man-JAH-reh vee-CHEE-noh ah RYAH-ltoh?

responses.english: At All'Arco or Do Mori, behind the market.
responses.phonetic: dah al-LAR-koh oh dah doh MOH-ree, DYEH-troh eel mer-KAH-toh.
responses.local: Da All'Arco o da Do Mori, dietro il mercato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the fish market closes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude il mercato del pesce?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh eel mer-KAH-toh del PEH-sheh?

responses.english: Usually at noon, closed on Thursdays.
responses.phonetic: dee SOH-lee-toh AL-leh DOH-dee-chee, eel joh-VEH-dee eh KYOO-zoh.
responses.local: Di solito alle dodici, il giovedì è chiuso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which vaporetto stops are closest to San Polo
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quali fermate del vaporetto servono San Polo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-lee fer-MAH-teh del vah-poh-RET-toh SER-voh-noh san POH-loh?

responses.english: San Silvestro or San Tomà, line one.
responses.phonetic: san seel-VES-troh oh san toh-MAH, LEE-neh-ah OO-noh.
responses.local: San Silvestro o San Tomà, linea uno.
